VesselState.title: VesselState
VesselState.description: The structural and maintenance parameters of the FPT-Ω Synara Class vessel.

repairCyclesCount.description: Total count of mechanical repair cycles executed.

cumulativeNanitesDischarged.description: Total nanoliter volume of structural nanites injected.

lastOverhaulCount.description: The repair cycle count at which the last subframe overhaul occurred.

emergencyAutoRepair.description: Indicates whether automatic diagnostic restoration is enabled.

criticalModeEnabled.description: Indicates if critical alarms trigger below threshold.

criticalThreshold.description: The hull integrity threshold for critical alarm state.

updatedAt.description: Server timestamp of the last parameter sync.

userId.description: UID of the commanding officer who authorized this state.

VesselLog.title: VesselLog
VesselLog.description: Event log entry of actions, anomalies, and structural repairs.

message.description: Human-readable telemetry description of the event.

userId.description: UID of the user associated with the event.

/users/{userId}/vessel_state/FPT-Omega.description: Global status tracking document for the commanding officer's vessel bridge.

/users/{userId}/logs/{logId}.description: Historical sub-ledgers for individual vessel activities and repairs.
